name: Southwest Tomatillo Salsa Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 small Chicken breast halves, boneless, skinless, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place tortillas on a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes or until lightly toasted.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the chopped tomatillos, tomatoes, jalapenos, cilantro, lime juice, garlic, hot pepper sauce, ground cumin, and salt. Stir in 1 cup of cheese.
4. Season chicken with chili powder and toss to coat evenly.
5. Spray a skillet with Pam cooking spray. Cook chicken until tender.
6. To assemble each pizza, spread half a cup of the tomato mixture on one tortilla.
7. Top with chicken, onion wedges, and 1/4 cup of remaining cheese.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
